name: Spiced Basmati Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 small onion, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the rice and place it in a bowl.
2. Wash the rice several times in water.
3. Drain the rice well.
4. Pour 5 cups of fresh water over the rice and let it soak for about 30 minutes.
5. Drain the rice in a sieve for about 20 minutes.
6. Heat the oil in a heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium heat.
7. When the oil is hot, add the onion and stir until lightly browned.
8. Add the rice, garlic, garam masala, and salt to the pan.
9. Stir gently for 3-4 minutes until all grains are coated with oil.
10. If the rice starts to stick to the bottom of the pan, reduce heat slightly.
11. Pour in the chicken stock and bring the mixture to a boil.
12. Cover with a tight-fitting lid and cook on very low heat for 25 minutes.
13. Alternatively, place the pot in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) and bake for 25 minutes.
